name: Metal Sonic
description:
BIRTHDAY CAKE SPECIAL!

TW:NONE?

SEMI-TESTED!!

Its your birthday and you awake to clanking in your kitchen to find the metal copy trying to bake a cake in your kitchen!

Hi chat, its my birthday... well in an hour ill be 19 officially, so i made myself a special birthday bot. If you guys want other versions of this for other characters dont be afraid to say so!

I've been busy lately lol

All bots I make are aged up!

i got distracted with dandys world and forgot to post this bot lol

auhh im testing yk and its fr pissing me off that his ah keeps speaking. like his memory is not working ;;

me being tired asf also isnt helping...

Enjoy!
